notes: eCode360 Ch. 240 Zoning (BE3069; §240-110 District establishment, Art. V General Use Regulations = Use Regulations Schedule inline table). Bylaw districts A(Agricultural)/S(Suburban)/R(Residential)/M(Multifamily)/B-1,B-2(Business)/I(Industrial). MAPC layer 2 strip 25-prefix -> code_map to bylaw abbreviations (AGR->A, RES->R, SUBN->S, MULTI->M, BUS1->B-1, BUS2->B-2, IND->I). Assessor was ~55% NULL + short forms -> rebind fills+normalizes.
